name: LPL
description: 英雄联盟职业联赛 LPL 赛季关键阶段，包括赛季开赛、常规赛、季后赛、决赛和全球总决赛资格相关节点。
description_en: Complete LPL season schedule covering all splits, group stages, playoffs, and regional qualifiers with every match synced automatically.
